// SECURITY: Do not put real secrets in this file. ClientSecret values below are placeholders — set the real values via `dotnet user-secrets` locally or via environment variables (MailSettings__ClientSecret / AzureAd__ClientSecret) in each environment. The previous secret committed here has been rotated and must not be reused.

MailSettings.// note: Also used by the recipients directory picker (Services/DirectoryService.cs), which additionally requires the 'User.Read.All' Microsoft Graph Application permission, admin-consented, on this same app registration — Mail.Send alone is not enough for directory search.
MailSettings.// SharedMailboxes note: Optional shared mailboxes users can pick as the 'Send From' address on an email, instead of their own account — e.g. [{ "DisplayName": "IT Operations", "Address": "it-ops@stellantis-fs.com" }]. Empty by default.

AzureAd.// note: Reuses the same Entra ID app registration as MailSettings. Requires a Web platform redirect URI (https://<host>/signin-oidc) and delegated User.Read/openid/profile/email permissions granted in Entra ID.

Testing.// note: Both must stay at these safe defaults for any real deployment. Flip WindowsAuthenticationEnabled to false ONLY to test the site on a server where the Entra ID redirect URI isn't set up yet — it bypasses sign-in entirely for every visitor while off. Set it back to true afterward.
